title: What's a UF
body: The UF is Chile's inflation-indexed unit of account. Property is priced in UF; the peso value updates daily.

title: Foreign-buyer rights + border-zone rule
body: Foreigners can own property in Chile with few restrictions, except border and coastal-security zones that need extra authorization.

title: How yield works
body: Short-stay income is seasonal and swings with occupancy. A cap on nights trims the high end of a town's yield range.

title: The rate backdrop
body: Cheaper financing lifts buyer demand. Watch mortgage rates alongside supply and regulation.
